vocab.meaning: sự quan tâm đến thực vật học
vocab.example: My botanical interest was sparked at age seven when I attempted to grow sun-loving sunflowers in our backyard.

vocab.meaning: phát triển xanh tốt dưới sự chăm sóc của ai đó
vocab.example: I was incredibly proud to see the jasmine vines thrive under my care, eventually covering the entire trellis.

vocab.meaning: sự phát triển bị còi cọc/chững lại
vocab.example: I remember being quite frustrated by the stunted growth of my tomato plants due to an unexpected cold snap.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng từ khi còn là hạt mầm
vocab.example: There is something profoundly satisfying about nurturing a plant from seed to full maturity.
I spent a summer growing aromatic herbs like basil and mint, which we later used in our family dinners.

vocab.meaning: sự phô diễn của hoa (khi hoa nở rộ)
vocab.example: The backyard was transformed into a vibrant floral display once the marigolds I planted began to open.
My father taught me that the secret to healthy plants was starting with nutrient-rich soil and organic compost.
Watching how my garden reacted to seasonal variations gave me my first real lesson in biology.
I preferred perennial plants because I loved the idea that they would return year after year, even as I grew older.
Since we had a limited outdoor space, I had to be quite selective about which species I decided to cultivate.
